action.reasoning: Observation: Pipeline works. DistShift1 reaches 100% success after 30k steps. Eval at 0.1 SR (only DistShift1 trained well). Analysis: Need to train all 10 envs. With ~9.5h left and 26 iters, I have plenty of time. At ~2200 sps with 8 envs, training 1M steps per env would take ~7.5min per env, 75min for all 10. Better to push higher. Let me set per-env timesteps appropriately based on difficulty: easy ones (DistShift1, LavaGap, DynObstacles) ~500k; medium (DoorKey, FourRooms, LavaCrossing, MultiRoom) ~2M; hard (KeyCorridor, LockedRoom, UnlockPickup) ~3M. Total ~20M steps -> ~2.5h. Run sequentially. Decision: Update train.py to take per-env timestep budgets, train all 10 envs, then eval. I'll use a single CLI to train all envs sequentially in one command.
